text: There is a mood of anticipation and creation in the air. The glass and screens, the scattered equipment, and the posture of the people around me make me feel both involved and slightly displaced, as if on the cusp of something emerging but not quite settled. The presence of the "R+D" wall and ladder underscores an environment of experimentation and work in progress. Here, surrounded by tools and ideas in flux, I sense that I am amidst a dance between potential and realization, and I feel both curious and cautiously optimistic.
